paper_title: Trainable Log-linear Sparse Attention for Efficient Diffusion Transformers
main_contribution: Introduction of Log-linear Sparse Attention (LLSA) mechanism
key_innovations: Multi-level hierarchical structure for query and key features
Progressive Top-K selection from coarse to fine
Reduction of attention complexity from quadratic to log-linear
problem_addressed: Quadratic complexity of full self-attention in Diffusion Transformers (DiTs)

technical_details.coarse_tokens: Enriches key, value sets with O(K log N) coarse tokens

limitations_of_existing_methods: Selection stage still incurs quadratic cost on compressed tokens
Single coarse-grained view insufficient for long sequences
title: Trainable Log-linear Sparse Attention for Efficient Diffusion Transformers
